Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Jul-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3760.

Mei Hom, Esq. appeared with petitioner Michelle Cancilla, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minors Michala Cancilla and Dominic Cancilla, who were also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Total Settlement - $9,557.60.
Attorney's Fees - $2,091.19.
Costs - $1,192.87.

A net balance of $6,273.54 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, located at 1330 North Main Street, Walnut Creek, CA 94956. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
